description: Retheme PixelSpriteView as cute ghost characters with improved name text visibility, and retheme PixelFurnitureView as haunted mansion furniture.
steps: Step 1 - Retheme PixelSpriteView.swift as ghost characters: Replace the human-style pixel art with cute ghost sprites. Ghost body should be a rounded teardrop/bell shape with wavy bottom, colored using palette (palette.hair = ghost body color, palette.shirt = glow/accent). Two large friendly white eyes with dark pupils. State animations: working=typing with keyboard glow, drinkingCoffee=holding potion bottle, needsInput=pulsing ! bubble, waitingForWork=floating with zzz text and half-closed eyes, walking=bobbing with slight movement, idle=gentle vertical float. Fix name text: increase font to .system(size: 10, weight: .medium), white text, dark pill background (black at 0.7 opacity, cornerRadius 3, horizontal padding 4), frame width 50.

Step 2 - Retheme PixelFurnitureView.swift: DeskView = dark gothic desk (very dark brown) with purple glowing monitor screen. ChairView = dark throne chair with purple accents. CoffeeMachineView = potion cauldron (round black pot with green/purple glow on top, small legs). CoffeeCounterView = dark stone counter (very dark gray/purple). PlantView = jack-o-lantern (orange pumpkin with triangle face cutouts, yellow glow, green stem).
acceptance_criteria: swift test passes all tests with 0 failures
Ghost sprite renders as rounded shape with eyes instead of human figure
Name text has white color on dark pill background
All 6 character states have distinct ghost visual treatments
